title: Glowroot Caves: Hybrid Encounter
description: Makes the Glowroot Hybrid boss from Glowroot Caves encounterable in survival gameplay.
body:
This is an addon mod for [Glowroot Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/glowroot) that allows the player to take on the Glowroot Hybrid boss in survival gameplay. The boss can be found in its own structure that generates in the Glowroot Caves.

For _/locate_ and [Structure](https://modrinth.com/mod/structure-compass)/[Explorer's Compass](https://modrinth.com/mod/explorers-compass) users, the structure's ID is: 
```
glowroot:glowroot_hybrid_station_
```
The boss even comes with its own animation before the fight starts as demonstrated in the video below
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7XwMnSHGUUk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Aside from its structure, this mod adds two new advancements pertaining to the boss and registers the boss under the entity tags _#forge:bosses_ and _#c:bosses,_ allowing other mods to recognize the Hybrid as a boss entity and therefore establishing any compatibility requited by the tags.

The boss is also bestowed its own entry in the [Boss Checklist](https://modrinth.com/mod/boss-checklist) mod.
